data.title: Ethereum Surpasses $3,000 Amid Optimism for Upcoming Upgrade
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Ethereum has regained the $3,000 mark, driven by market optimism surrounding the forthcoming Fusaka upgrade. This rise is supported by the general increase in major altcoins like SOL and BNB, pushing the total cryptocurrency market capitalization to approximately $3.2 trillion.

Timothy Misir, Head of Research at BRN, noted that the recent price surge is partly due to the liquidation of significant BTC short positions above $93,000, which triggered a wave of forced buying. Additionally, spot ETF fund flows have contributed positively, with the U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF recording a net inflow of about $58.5 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of positive inflows.

data.title: DeAgentAI Reports Unauthorized Access to Discord Server
data.description: According to BlockBeats, DeAgentAI, an AI infrastructure within the Sui ecosystem, announced that its Discord server may have been compromised by hackers, leading to unauthorized access. The company has ensured that on-chain data remains secure and has promptly migrated to a new Discord server. DeAgentAI emphasized that it will not send private messages asking users to link wallets or sign any transactions.

data.title: Monero Approaches Critical $350–$360 Zone – Here is why this dip may become a buying opportunity.
data.description:
Monero, a well-known cryptocurrency, is currently nearing the crucial price range of $350 to $360. This level is seen as significant by many investors and analysts alike. As the digital asset experiences a temporary dip in its value, there are compelling reasons to consider this moment as a potential buying opportunity. Factors such as market trends, historical performance, and the unique privacy features that Monero offers may drive its value back up, making this dip an advantageous time to invest for those looking to enter or enhance their positions in this cryptocurrency.
source: https://blocknews.com/monero-approaches-critical-350-360-zone-here-is-why-this-dip-may-become-a-buying-opportunity/

data.title: Australian Bitcoin Association Challenges ABC News Report on Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, the Australian Bitcoin Industry Association has lodged a formal complaint against an article published by ABC News. The association claims the article contains 'multiple factual errors' and 'biased reporting.' The contentious piece from ABC News asserts that Bitcoin 'lacks any practical use' and is predominantly utilized by 'those operating in the shadows.' The association is urging ABC News to issue a correction statement and to incorporate expert opinions from the cryptocurrency sector in future reports.

data.title: Gensler separates Bitcoin from the pack, calls most crypto ‘highly speculative’
data.description:
In a new Bloomberg interview, former SEC Chair Gary Gensler reiterated that Bitcoin stands apart from thousands of other crypto tokens, which he describes as ‘highly speculative’ assets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ex-sec-gensler-cryptocurrencies-speculative?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_nocache%3D1764762605593%26r%3Dldfwel&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Strategy Joins Open Semantic Interchange Standard to Enhance Data Interoperability
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin treasury company Strategy has announced its participation in the Open Semantic Interchange (OSI) standard. This industry-wide semantic interchange standard, launched by technology giants Salesforce and Snowflake, aims to address enterprise data interoperability issues by providing a unified semantic framework for cross-platform data consistency. Strategy plans to accelerate its open ecosystem strategy through its AI-driven universal semantic layer, Strategy Mosaic.

data.title: Bitfury Plans $50 Million Investment in Decentralized AI Network Gonka
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency mining company Bitfury has announced its intention to invest $50 million in the decentralized artificial intelligence computing network Gonka. Launched in August, the Gonka network currently boasts computing resources equivalent to approximately 6,000 NVIDIA H100 GPUs. Last month, Bitfury revealed a strategic investment of $12 million in Gonka AI's GNK tokens.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Wallet Discovered in Fugitive's Computer, UK Police Investigate
data.description: According to Odaily, a report by Caijing magazine reveals that a computer taken by fugitive Qian Zhimin contained a cryptocurrency wallet. During multiple searches by UK police, several electronic devices, including phones, computers, and USB drives, were seized. One USB drive held photos of notebook pages, which were allegedly torn out before police confiscation. These pages recorded the boot password and mnemonic phrases for the black computer, such as 'number + love,' along with numerical hints, facilitating the discovery of Bitcoin. Additionally, Caijing reported that last month, the Supreme Court held the eighth national criminal trial work conference, addressing the improvement of judicial rules and focusing on new issues like the handling of virtual currencies involved in cases and the certification of electronic data evidence.

data.title: Eutelsat’s stock falls by 7% after SoftBank cuts stake in rights‑issue fire sale
data.description:
Europe’s satellite giant Eutelsat on Wednesday saw its stock sink brutally after SoftBank sold off 36 million rights, which equals around 26 million shares on Eutelsat. The announcement triggered a 7. 2% plunge in early trading, with shares last quoted lower as of press time, based on data from CNBC. SoftBank unloads shares as Eutelsat lags […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eutelsats-stock-falls-by-7/

data.title: Solana Wallet Phishing Attack Results in Significant Asset Loss
data.description:
According to PANews, SlowMist recently reported on its official WeChat account that a user sought assistance after falling victim to a phishing attack. The user noticed unusual authorization records in their Solana wallet and attempted to revoke the authorization but was unsuccessful. The affected wallet address was provided for investigation.

Blockchain analysis revealed that the user's account owner permissions had been transferred to an address beginning with 'GKJBEL.' As a result, the user lost assets valued at over $3 million, while an additional $2 million worth of assets remained in a DeFi protocol and could not be moved. Fortunately, with the help of the relevant DeFi platform, the $2 million in assets were successfully recovered.

The victim attempted to initiate a transfer from the compromised account to their own address to verify permissions, but all transactions failed. This incident closely resembles the 'malicious multi-signature' attacks frequently seen in the TRON ecosystem. Unlike traditional 'authorization theft,' this attack involved the replacement of core owner permissions by the attacker. Consequently, the victim was unable to transfer funds, revoke authorizations, or manage DeFi assets. Although the funds were visible, they were beyond the victim's control.

data.title: Cardano Foundation Appoints Stephen Wood as CFO
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Cardano Foundation has announced the appointment of Stephen Wood as its Chief Financial Officer. Wood will be responsible for driving financial strategy, overseeing financial processes, guiding fund management, managing risks, and leading the finance team.

Wood previously served as the Finance Director and Executive Committee member at Copper.co, a digital asset infrastructure provider. He brings over 20 years of experience in leading financial functions within high-growth, complex organizations, with expertise spanning both traditional finance and digital asset sectors.

His career began at Verint, where he held various financial positions for 15 years, including managing financial planning and global corporate performance management. Additionally, Wood held senior roles at Keyko, where he integrated blockchain technology into accounting practices.
